title: No More leaking bases
description: makes it so underground things like stone ores and more are invisible
body:
Protect your $1 Billion stash from the most dangerous exploit on the Donut SMP. Many players don’t realize that Minecraft’s 'random' block rotations for stone, dirt, and deepslate aren’t actually random—they are seeded by your exact X, Y, Z coordinates. A single screenshot or video of your base walls can allow raiders to use Terrain Pattern Finders to calculate your location and raid you while you're offline. 
This resource pack is your ultimate defense. It retextures all underground blocks into a uniform, high-quality Netherite style, effectively removing the unique rotation states that leakers use to track you down. Not only does it give your base a legendary, wealthy aesthetic, but it also makes it Streamer-Safe. You can now record tours or show off your loot without worrying about a single block rotation giving away your coordinates. Stay hidden, stay rich, and make your base look like the ultimate Netherite empire!"
